title: GreenLang Factors — Gold-Label Evaluation Entry
description: One activity-description -> ground-truth factor_id pair used by the Certified edition promotion gate. Each line of activity_to_factor.jsonl must validate against this schema.

activity_text.description: Real-world free-text description of the activity (as it would appear in a corporate GHG survey or invoice).

method_profile.description: MethodProfile the cascade must bind to. Non-negotiable #6 - MUST be a registered profile.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code or continent shorthand (US, EU, UK, IN, CN, JP, BR, ZA).

expected_factor_id.description: Canonical factor_id that resolution MUST return as the top-1 match. Cases whose id is not present in the local EmissionFactorDatabase are logged as skipped_missing_factor and excluded from pass/fail math (capped at 20% of the set).

acceptable_alternates.description: Additional factor_ids that are semantically equivalent and would satisfy top-5 recall. MUST be grounded - never fabricate. Leave empty if the expected_factor_id is the only acceptable answer.

slice.description: High-level domain slice. Per-slice accuracy is computed and enforced by the gate.

difficulty.description: Authoring label. 'easy' = explicit fuel + unit + geography; 'medium' = one ambiguity; 'hard' = multi-signal disambiguation or adversarial wording.

source_hint.description: Human-readable citation for the worked example (e.g. 'DEFRA 2024 table A1', 'EPA GHG Hub - Stationary Combustion', 'CBAM Annex IV default values').

notes.description: Optional authoring note explaining the ground-truth choice or edge case.
